calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Gerard Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff, Coronado Hotel
Alonzo Sanders, Defendant in propria persona

Settlement Conference held. Case settled on the record.
Stipulated agreement was read into the record as follows:
Restitution and possession to Plaintiff of the premises located at: 373 Ellis Street, #502, San Francisco, CA.
Stay of eviction stayed until after 9am 5/14/04.
Judgment will be satisfied if Defendant vacates the premises by 5/14/04.
Each party to bear its own costs.
Plaintiff will provide to Defendant a statement regarding a police report concerning Defendants eviction.
Plaintiff's counsel will prepare and provide a written stipulated agreement to the Defendant. After the Defendant signs, Plaintiff's counsel will submitt the agreemnt to the court.

JPT: Irving Pfeffer (304B) Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Jo Ann Bryce
